items.summary: Led OpihPda (factory procurement & warehouse) and Hipobuy (overseas procurement) from development to App Store / Google Play; used AI tools to improve efficiency.
Mini-program development and ops for Xinmeiye and Ruiyanling; AI-driven beauty marketing; nearly 1,000 stores onboarded.
Smart community, video intercom (WebRTC), Chaozhiwei ERP supply chain, smart access, vending machines, coffee machines, beauty devices; technical decisions and team leadership.
ERP for procurement, sales, warehousing, sorting, logistics; POS/scanner and app integration; traceability.

Vending/coffee machine hardware and app/mini-programs; Yimeifan beauty device mini-program and payment; Ruiyanling beauty SaaS, ERP, mini-programs; smart access (Huixin IoT), Dashi 2D scan-to-video-call.
Backend R&D and technical management; IoT projects including Duzun Tanba; PHP, Redis, Swoole.
OA/ERP presales, implementation and consulting; government and enterprise office systems.
